rulings.Case Title: EUGENE JUN TOM et al VS. NORMA MADUGAL et al
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER RELOCATION COST WAS CONDITIONED UPON DEFENDANT WAIVING HIS RIGHTS. REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE TO DO DISCOVERY DENIED. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IN PART. A. GRANT AS TO WAIVED/CHANGED NOTICE (3D). NO CONTROVERTING EVIDENCE. B. GRANT AS TO RETALIATION (3E) AS A MATTER OF LAW. C. GRANT AS TO DISCRIMINATION (3F). NO CONTROVERTING EVIDENCE. D. DENY AS TO VIOLATION OF SFADMINISTRATIVE CODE (3G). E. GRANT AS TO ACCEPTANCE OF RENT (3H). NO CONTROVERTING EVIDENCE. F. DENY AS TO VIOLATION OF ELLIS ACT (3I). (PB)
